title: Jus Amazin
description: End-to-end visual identity for a D2C peanut butter brand — packaging design across 15+ SKUs, social media systems, retail POS, and a complete brand guidelines document that scaled with the company.

testimonial.quote: Shiv doesn't just design — he builds systems. The Jus Amazin packaging is one of the most coherent brand rollouts I've seen for a D2C brand at our scale.
testimonial.author: Jitin Kochhar

title: Desi Energy Bar
description: Packaging design for a healthy snack brand, focusing on bold typography and illustrative elements to stand out on shelves.

title: Paintings
description: A collection of personal acrylic paintings exploring texture, light, and the essence of Bengaluru.

title: Brand Assets
description: Custom illustrations and brand assets for various clients, bridging the gap between art and commercial design.

title: Design Systems
description: Scaling visual identities through robust design systems and documentation, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints.
